=Hi {{ $json.homeownerName }}! TrustyPro found a {{ $json.opportunityType }} opportunity at your home (est. ${{ $json.estimatedValue }}). View your personalized deal: {{ $json.dealUrl }}

_meta.description: Fires when an AI opportunity is ready for homeowner outreach. Sends email always; SMS only if phone is available. Payload: { homeownerEmail, homeownerName, homeownerPhone, opportunityType, description, estimatedValue, partnerName, dealUrl, unsubscribeUrl, beforeAfterImageHtml }
_meta.setup: 1. Set Twilio + Resend env vars. 2. Set webhook URL in ProLnk admin → Webhooks → Homeowner Opportunity. 3. Activate.
